body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
1. Make soil albedo parameterization modular


## Content
Introduce two albedo model types:
ConstantTwoBandSoilAlbedo
CLMTwoBandSoilAlbedo

and dispatch off of those.

Remove a variable from scratch that we no longer need in the update_albedo! function for CLM

title: make albedo paramterization modular
